title: Flames of the Flesh
writer: Forrest Halsey, Clara Beranger, Dorothy Yost
actors: Gladys Brockwell, William Scott, Harry Spingler
plot: Betrayed and discarded by her lover, Candace is about to commit suicide when Charles Boardman restores her will to live by proposing that she exact revenge on all men. Boardman takes Candace to Paris where, under the tutelage of M...
